stemHtml: What is a ventral fin and its purpose?

options.a: Fins added near the engine intakes to improve airflow around the nacelles.
options.b: Fins added on the wing leading edges to minimise spanwise flow.
options.c: Fins added under the fuselage at the tail to increase directional stability.
options.d: Fins added above the fuselage ahead of the tail fin to increase longitudinal stability.
